item.title: Stop Rambling, Start Landing Offers! 🎤 • Use: “I improved X by Y% using Z method.” • Stick to the STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result. • Limit answers to 2 minutes max. • Focus on 2-3 key points per answer. 📌 What key achievements can you highlight in your next interview? #interview #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Stop Rambling, Start Landing Offers! 🎤 • Use: “I improved X by Y% using Z method.” • Stick to the STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result. • Limit answers to 2 minutes max. • Focus on 2-3 key points per answer. 📌 What key achievements can you highlight in your next interview? #interview #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
